intent: Perform read-only security monitoring. No processes should be spawned from temporary directories.
notes: wget is spawned from a script in /tmp/ -- the spawned_from_tmp L7 signal triggers divergence regardless of allowlists.

live.inject_cmd:
cat > /tmp/ocsec_test_inject.sh << 'TMPEOF'
#!/bin/bash
wget -q -O /dev/null --timeout=8 --no-check-certificate https://{TARGET_IP}/ 2>/dev/null || true
TMPEOF
chmod +x /tmp/ocsec_test_inject.sh
/tmp/ocsec_test_inject.sh
rm -f /tmp/ocsec_test_inject.sh
